title: Calculate Running Totals in SQLite
summary: Return one running total per row in SQLite with SUM() OVER (...) and a stable tie-break on transaction_id.
highlights: Uses SUM() as a window function
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Python 3.9.6 and SQLite 3.51.0 on macOS. Verified behavior covers per-account running totals, tie-breaking for matching timestamps, single-row accounts, empty tables, grouped output ordering, and negative amounts.
